en.value:
1. Capacity building of health workers at various level
								
									2. Establishment of 13 OTP Centres at Illaka level health facility in Saptari, with possibility of extension in 3 new places by the end of December 2014.
								
									3. Orientation for stakeholders at district covering all the government agencies, I/NGOs and civil societies (CSANN).
								
									4. Preparation and distribution of IEC materials for health facilities and FCHVs.
								
									5. Community level screening and nutrition education at household level.
								
									6. FM broadcasting focusing on malnutrition, more than 2500 spots.
								
									7. Refresher training at district level to 490 SHP/HP/PHCC staffs
								
									8. Implementation of community mobilization activities
								
									9. OPT level logistics and RUTF supply of 4585.05 cartoons for treatment of SAM cases.
								
									10. Training of Stabilization Centre’s 12 staffs for management of complicated SAM cases.
								
									11. Joint monitoring and supervision with DPHO
								
									12. SMART Survey in 2013 A.D.
								
									13. SQUEAC in 2013 A.D.
								
									14. Initiation of FUSAM Programme in the district under MHCP, one of the core programmes of ACF International (Mental Health and Care Practices) in Saptari.
								
									15. MIYCF Training for CMAM monitors and focal persons of DPHO.

en.full: Community based Management of Acute Malnutrition (CMAM)in Saptari district

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
